steps: Go to https://app.planetscale.com and sign in or create a free account
Navigate to your Organization settings by clicking the organization name in the top-left
Click 'Settings' then select 'OAuth applications' from the left sidebar
Fill in the application name, homepage URL, and redirect URIs
Copy the 'Client ID' shown on the application page
Click 'Generate a new client secret' and copy the secret immediately — it will not be shown again

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Client ID
credential_fields.description: Your PlanetScale OAuth application client ID

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: Client Secret
credential_fields.description: Your PlanetScale OAuth application client secret

notes: OAuth applications are available to all organizations
The client secret is shown only once at creation time — store it securely
Available scopes include: read_databases, write_databases, read_branches, write_branches, create_databases, delete_databases
Free hobby tier available with limited databases and branches

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the currently authenticated user's details
